raw_consumer_statement: I received a text " XXXX XXXX Citi XXXX XXXX. We declined {$99.00} at XXXX XXXX Was this you? Reply XXXX or XXXX or sign on to Citi XXXX XXXX '' on XX/XX/year>. So I logged into Citi XXXX XXXX. There were many transactions asking me to approve or decline. I didn't know those transactions, so I declined all of them and disputed XXXX transactions in total. At the same time, I reported a card lost and requested to get a new card. But Citibank charged me {$6.00} interest for these fraud transactions. And Citibank charged and refunded several times : - {$0.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, {$6.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, {$6.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, - {$6.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, - {$6.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, - {$6.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, {$6.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, {$6.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, {$0.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. Finally Citibank still charged me {$6.00} interest! Citibank, please calculate them! I have submitted this complaint XXXX times! Do not waste my time! Why are you so stupid?!
